stemHtml: In a bootstrap air cycle system, the…

options.a: turbine increases the pressure of the air supply to the cabin.
options.b: temperature drop across the turbine is the main contributor to the cooling effect of the air cycle machine.
options.c: turbine drives the compressor, which provides pressurisation.
options.d: turbine drives the compressor, which increases the temperature of the air, thus making the second heat exchanger more efficient.
